pi_items.source: Prompt description explicitly lists ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544) and CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274). Confirmed these correspond to real NORAD satellite catalog IDs.
Prompt description explicitly lists NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849), and FENGYUN 3B (NORAD 37214). Confirmed these correspond to real NORAD satellite catalog IDs.
Prompt description explicitly specifies Latitude = 42.3601 N. Confirmed this geographically points to the MIT campus.
Prompt description explicitly specifies Longitude = 71.0942 W (which is -71.0942). Confirmed this geographically points to the MIT campus.
Prompt description explicitly specifies Altitude = 12 meters.
Prompt description explicitly specifies minimum elevation angle for pass predictions to 10 degrees.
Prompt description explicitly requires to display UTC time.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env orbital_mechanics_lab_setup task. Verified that the data involves real NORAD catalog IDs for satellites (ISS: 25544, CSS: 48274, NOAA 19: 33591, SUOMI NPP: 37849, FENGYUN 3B: 37214). Confirmed that all metadata claims exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt, including the target satellite IDs, MIT ground station coordinates (42.3601 N, 71.0942 W, 12m), minimum elevation (10 degrees), and UTC time requirement.
